description: Safe example targets for draft-only Dealix Full Company OS runs. These are illustrative seed cards, not scraped contacts and not approved outreach recipients.

targets.pain_hypothesis: Patient inquiries and follow-ups may be spread across WhatsApp, calls, and front-desk notes.
targets.buying_signal: Local service business with recurring inquiries and appointment operations.
targets.proof_to_show: Revenue leak checklist plus draft follow-up queue, not promised financial results.

targets.pain_hypothesis: Enrollment leads may lose momentum when follow-up is not structured by urgency and decision stage.
targets.buying_signal: Training businesses benefit from clear follow-up, scripts, and proof of activity.

targets.pain_hypothesis: A foreign SaaS company may need Saudi market-entry targeting, partner mapping, and localized proof.
targets.buying_signal: International B2B software entering or testing GCC/Saudi expansion.
targets.proof_to_show: Saudi opportunity snapshot and partner-readiness checklist.

targets.pain_hypothesis: Sales follow-up and proposal tracking may be inconsistent across inboxes and spreadsheets.
targets.buying_signal: B2B services teams often need a daily command queue and proof of follow-up work.
targets.proof_to_show: Daily revenue command sample and approval queue.

targets.pain_hypothesis: A distributor or partner candidate may need structured mapping, proposal preparation, and next-step clarity.
targets.buying_signal: Partner/distributor relationships benefit from fit scoring and proof-backed introductions.
targets.proof_to_show: Partner fit checklist and draft introduction pack.
